root.sql: SELECT sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.membership_no, sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.operate_date, sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.item_type, sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.share_value, sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.share_stock ,sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock as mem_stock FROM sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail ,sc_mem_m_share_mem WHERE sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no = sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.membership_no and sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.item_type = 'BF' /*WHERE*/
